<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get notifications for company"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_uuid}/notifications"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all notifications relevant for the given company.

scope: `notifications:read`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
